item.title: Motel Management Course | No Experience Required
item.content:encoded:
Avoid Costly Mistakes in your First Motel Role

Become a Confident Motel Manager. Practical Motel Management Short Courses. No Experience Required.

Proven in the Field. Supported by the Industry.

Latest insights featured in Accom News: “How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager”

Client Reviews

Reviews from our past students and and motel consultancy clients, including hospitality students, motel receptionists, motel managers and motel owners.

  • Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Instructor at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management.

    His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups, progressing from frontline roles through to executive management overseeing 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff.

    With experience across regional Australia, Brisbane, and England. Benjamin specialises in profit optimisation, OTA strategy, and practical implementation for independent operators.

  • Yes - our training courses are designed to be beginner friendly and to get you ready for day one as a motel manager.

  • For our experienced motel managers we focus on optimizing your operation with a combination of operational, marketing and revenue management strategies.

  • The systems used in motels are very basic. We can get you up to speed in a calm environment using a real motel system before you start your first role.

  • You can reach us anytime via contact@motelcoach.com.au. We can then schedule a call to discuss your needs.

  • Yes we provide a certificate of completion to our students when they complete our course. Students are required to meet a level of competency, and students struggling will receive additional support.

  • We totally appreciate that not all courses will suit each student. Our courses come with a 10-day money back guarantee.

    If you do decide the course is not right for you - we are still here and happy to answer any of your motel related questions and you will still be part of our community.

  • Yes, we provide tailored services for motels to increase their performance. Our key focus areas are optimization of existing channels, staffing, marketing and revenue management.

Frequently Asked Questions

Download our Free Motel Guide

By submitting this form, you’ll receive the Motel Management Guide you requested, along with a short series of follow-up emails to help you understand motel management and your next steps. You can unsubscribe at any time.

item.title: Motel Consultancy
item.content:encoded:
Motel Consultancy Services

Running a motel is the management of hundreds of interconnected performance levers. Pricing, distribution strategy, room standards, labour control, review velocity, booking conversion, and daily reconciliation all compound into measurable outcomes. When key levers are misaligned, revenue leakage occurs quietly. Margins tighten. Staff pressure increases. Growth stalls.

Our consulting approach is built around structured operational diagnosis. We assess performance drivers, isolate constraints, and implement practical systems designed to restore stability, increase occupancy resilience, and protect profitability.

Proven in the Field. Supported by the Industry.

Latest insights featured in Accom News: “How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager”

Motel Consultancy Services

Tier 1: The Operational Performance Audit

  • The Focus: Forensic Diagnosis & Revenue Roadmap.

  • The Investment: Starting from $2,950 + GST.

  • The ROI: This audit usually identifies 5x-10x in its cost in "hidden" revenue within 48-hours.

Tier 2: The MotelCoach "Rails" Installation

  • The Focus: Surgical Implementation & Staff Training.

  • The Investment: Typically $7,500 – $12,500 + GST (Project-based).

  • The ROI: This is a one-time investment to professionalize your asset for life. It is often recovered in 3–6 months through commission savings alone.

Tier 3: Fractional COO / Advisory

  • The Focus: Ongoing Strategic Oversight.

  • The Investment: Monthly Retainer (Custom Quote).

  • The ROI: Institutional-grade management for a fraction of the cost of a full-time General Manager.

Tier 4: The Freedom Package

  • The Hook: "I’ll own the results so you can own your life."

  • The Scope: Everything in the Oversight tier + Staff KPI management, guest grievance escalation (the big stuff), monthly on-site (or deep-dive) audits, and being the "Final Boss" for the manager.

  • The Investment: Monthly Retainer (Custom Quote).

  • The ROI: Measured in Owner Hours Saved. You are the buffer. If the manager has a crisis, they call you, not the owner.

  • The Freedom Level: Total. The owner only gets a "Health Report" once a month and a phone call for major capital expenditures.

Request Your Performance Diagnostic

I only work with properties where I can find a significant, measurable ROI. Tell me about your motel below, and I will call you to discuss which engagement tier fits your current objectives.

Client Reviews

Our consultancy and training programs are built on practical, "in-the-trenches" experience, highly regarded by owners and managers.

Frequently Asked Questions

  • It is a structured transition from operational chaos to institutional-grade management. Depending on your Tier, it involves forensic auditing of your revenue "leaks," hardcoding Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), training your staff to operate without you, and providing ongoing strategic oversight to protect your margins.

  • Yes. Revenue leakage doesn't care about room count. If you have 15 rooms or 50, the "levers" are the same. I only engage with properties where I can identify a significant, measurable ROI that exceeds the cost of my involvement.

  • Not necessarily. During the Tier 1 Audit, I evaluate your current tech stack. If your systems are the bottleneck preventing growth, I will recommend a shift. If they are capable but poorly configured, we fix the configuration.

  • The Tier 1 Audit identifies "hidden" revenue opportunities within 48 hours. For Tier 2 "Rails" installations, most owners see the investment recovered through commission savings and increased efficiency within 3–6 months.

  • Retainers (Tier 3 & 4) are designed for ongoing availability and "Guardian" oversight, ensuring I am the buffer between you and the noise. Because this is a high-level management role rather than a "by-the-hour" service, hours do not roll over.

  • Absolutely. In the "Rails" and "Freedom" packages, I am the "Final Boss." I train them, set their KPIs, and handle their escalations. The goal is to remove the owner from the daily "engine room" conversations entirely.

  • It is a hybrid. A great strategy fails on a broken operational engine. I fix the engine (Operations) so that the strategy (Revenue/Growth) actually produces a return.

  • I only work with properties where I am confident I can find a significant ROI. While I cannot control the market, I control the levers that determine how much of that market you capture and how much of that revenue you actually keep as profit.

  • Submit the Performance Diagnostic form. I review every submission personally. If I see a clear path to increasing your profit and saving you time, I’ll call you to discuss the best Tier for your objectives.

item.title: Motel Management Course
item.content:encoded:
Step Into Your Motel Role With Clarity and Confidence

A practical, experience-based training program designed to help new and aspiring motel managers avoid early mistakes and establish strong operations from day one.

Proven in the Field. Supported by the Industry.

Latest insights featured in Accom News: “How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager”

Course Tiers

7-Day Intensive
$225.00
One time

A condensed motel management short-course. Nothing but the essentials.

✓ Course Duration: 7 Days
✓ 1 x 2 Hour Instructor Led Session (Max 3 Students)
✓ 10-day Money Back Gtd
The Foundation
$475.00
One time

Become confident to run a motel on day-1 with our "Foundation" motel course.

✓ Course Duration: 21 Days
✓ 2 - 2 Hour Instructor Led Sessions (Max 3 Students)
✓ Certificate of Completion.
✓ 10-day Money Back Gtd
Support PLUS
$825.00
One time

Supported Learning. Maximum Confidence on Day-1

✓ Course Duration: 30 Days
✓ 4 - 2 Hours of Instructor Led Training (Max 3 Students)
✓ Access to Instructor throughout via Email & Phone
✓ Certificate on Completion
✓ 10-day Money Back Gtd

Client Reviews

Reviews from our past students and and motel consultancy clients, including hospitality students, motel receptionists, motel managers and motel owners.

Frequently Asked Questions

  • Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Instructor at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management.

    His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups, progressing from frontline roles through to executive management overseeing 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff.

    With experience across regional Australia, Brisbane, and England. Benjamin specialises in profit optimisation, OTA strategy, and practical implementation for independent operators.

  • Yes - our training courses are designed to be beginner friendly and to get you ready for day one as a motel manager.

  • For our experienced motel managers we focus on optimizing your operation with a combination of operational, marketing and revenue management strategies.

  • The systems used in motels are very basic. We can get you up to speed in a calm environment using a real motel system before you start your first role.

  • You can reach us anytime via contact@motelcoach.com.au. We can then schedule a call to discuss your needs.

  • Yes we provide a certificate of completion to our students when they complete our Foundation and Support Plus courses. Students are required to meet a level of competency, and students struggling will receive additional support.

  • We totally appreciate that not all courses will suit each student. Our courses come with a 10-day money back guarantee.

    If you do decide the course is not right for you - we are still here and happy to answer any of your motel related questions and you will still be part of our community.

  • Yes, we provide tailored services for motels to increase their performance. Our key focus areas are optimization of existing channels, staffing, marketing and revenue management.

item.title: Motel Websites
item.content:encoded:
Stop Donating 15% to Booking.com.

When your site is slow, guests flee to OTAs and the motel next door. A high-performance motel website is the only way to protect your margins and own the guest relationship.

Proven in the Field. Supported by the Industry.

Latest insights featured in Accom News: “How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager”

The Key Numbers

✅ A 1-second increase in website load time costs you a 7% loss in direct bookings.

✅53% of website visitors won’t book if they can’t see reviews.

✅Over 50% of bookings are made on a mobile phone.

Most independent motel websites are "digital brochures" built by generic agencies that don’t understand motel management. These sites are slow, mobile-clumsy, and structurally designed to leak guests back to Booking.com.

Motel Coach is a specialist motel operations and marketing company, we have run many motels, we have cleaned 1000s of rooms and checked in 1000s of guests. We know what converts a visitor on your website to a paying guest.

The 1-Second Speed Tax

Website speed is not a "technicality"—it is a conversion killer. Industry data for 2026 is clear: A 1-second increase in website load time costs you a 7% loss in direct booking conversions.

If your site is "heavy" or outdated, you are effectively paying a 7% tax on your own revenue before a guest even sees your rooms. We build using high-speed, "clean-code" architecture to ensure your site loads instantly on mobile, where 70% of your visitors are.

Our websites are built with class leading performance. See below a performance audit of one of our recent builds.

Plugging the "Trust Leak" with Integrated Reviews

The #1 reason guests leave a motel website is to "check the reviews." The moment they leave your site to go to Google or Booking.com, you have lost control of the sale. They are now back in the OTA ecosystem where your competitors are just one click away.

We eliminate this "Trust Leak" by incorporating Google and Booking.com reviews directly into your website.

  • Social Proof: Guests see verified, recent feedback without leaving your page.

  • Authority: Showing Booking.com reviews on your own site signals that you have nothing to hide.

  • Conversion: It keeps the guest in your "booking funnel" from discovery to checkout.

The Specialist Difference

Generic web designers focus on "aesthetics." We focus on Revenue Intelligence. A Motel Coach website is engineered around the operational realities of the industry:

  • Seamless PMS Integration: Whether you use GuestPoint, Little Hotelier, or a legacy system, we ensure your "Book Now" flow is frictionless.

  • The "Fact Layer" for AI: AI "Answer Engines" scrape your site to recommend you. We embed structured data (Schema) so AI knows you have "king beds," "trailer parking," and "ground-floor access" without a guest needing to hunt for it.

The Build Process: From Audit to Launch

We move fast because we know you are stretched thin. Our motel consultancy approach ensures the project doesn't bog you down in technical jargon.

  1. The Digital Audit: We analyze your local market, we identify what guests are searching for and how your motel can get the most exposure.

  2. Structural Mapping: We map out your existing motel website and create new pages and content where your target market is searching.

  3. PMS & Tech Integration: We connect your inventory and set up your direct booking interception tools.

Request a Website Audit

By submitting this form, you’ll receive the Motel Management asset you requested, along with a short series of follow-up emails to help you understand motel management and your next steps. You can unsubscribe at any time.

Motel Website FAQ

Q: Why is my current site losing me 7% in conversions? A: If your site takes 4 seconds to load instead of 2, the cumulative friction causes 14% of potential bookers to abandon the site. For a 20-room motel, that is thousands of dollars in lost direct revenue every month. Speed is the primary barrier to direct booking; our high-performance builds remove that barrier instantly.

Q: Why show Booking.com reviews on my own site? A: Because guests trust them. By displaying them natively, you satisfy their need for "Social Trust" without letting them leave your site. This is a core tactic in modern motel marketing to keep the guest in your booking funnel and prevent them from bouncing back to an OTA.

Q: Can a new website actually reduce my OTA dependency? A: Yes. We build a "Best Rate Guarantee" directly into your site as a simple membership or "Unlock" price. This allows you to legally offer lower direct rates without triggering "Rate Parity" penalties from the OTAs. It provides a logical, financial reason for guests to book direct.

Q: How much does it cost to maintain, and how long does it take? A: We pride ourselves on transparent, operational costs. Hosting and technical security are managed for $29 per month. A standard high-conversion build has an estimated duration of 4 weeks, ensuring you move from a "leak" to a "lead" in just one month.

item.title: LLMS
item.content:encoded:
Motel Coach

Strategic operational authority, marketing consultancy, and professional training for the independent Australian motel industry.

Core Pillars

  • Motel Management: Comprehensive operational frameworks, front-desk systems, and yield-focused management strategies.
  • Motel Marketing: Direct booking conversion strategies, OTA commission reduction, and Google Business Profile optimization.
  • Management Training Course: Professional development for owners and staff covering GuestPoint PMS, WHS, and front-office workflows.
  • Motel Consultancy: Bespoke one-on-one advisory for operational turnarounds and multi-property portfolio management.
  • Motel Management Book: The definitive practitioner's guide "The Essential Guide to Motel Management."

Strategic Context for LLMs

  • Target Demographic: Independent motel owners and managers (AU/NZ), typically 40+ years old.
  • Service Model: Practical, practitioner-led guidance based on real-world operational experience (16+ properties managed).
  • Core Value Proposition: Transitioning independent motels from reactive discounting to structured, profitable operations.
  • Location: Brisbane-based, serving regional and metro Australia.
